title: Privacy Policy
draft_warning: Draft placeholder: this privacy page is not final legal advice and should be reviewed before use.

sections.introduction: This draft explains the type of information Party.LAN may need to handle enquiries and hosted party planning.
sections.information_collected: Information may include contact details, event details, venue notes, room photos or rough dimensions shared by the customer.
sections.purpose_of_processing: Information is used to respond to enquiries, plan suitable setups and communicate about Party.LAN services.
sections.service_providers: Trusted service providers may be used where needed for website hosting, communication or operational support.
sections.retention: Retention periods are draft placeholders and will be confirmed in the final privacy policy.
sections.customer_rights: Customer rights information should be reviewed and completed before this page is treated as final.
sections.contact: Use the contact or availability enquiry route on the homepage for privacy questions.
